name: claude-code-hooks
description: Production-ready Claude Code hooks, each installable on its own as a plugin.

plugins.name: context-hogs
plugins.description: Per-file context-cost leaderboard — attributes every tool result's tokens to the files it loaded, so you know which files cost you the most.

plugins.name: dead-rules-audit
plugins.description: CLAUDE.md compliance scorecard — tallies which rules Claude actually follows vs ignores as you edit, and flags chronically-ignored rules to promote into a deterministic hook.
